untranslatable_reason: This is a distributional/statistical parameter for position sizing model calibration, not a sizing rule. It describes HOW to calculate the price window input (3 standard deviations) but does not specify HOW to size positions (no allocation %, no scaling multiplier, no Kelly fraction, no risk amount). The actual sizing method (OPTIMAL_F, KELLY, FIXED_FRACTIONAL, etc.) is explicitly marked as AUTHOR_SILENT. Without the sizing method itself, this cannot be translated to actionable position sizing logic.
